basic_details.job_title: Social Welfare Department Coimbatore Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 26 MPH, IT Admin and Posts
basic_details.post_name: Case worker, IT Admin, MultiPurpose Helper, Security
basic_details.short_information: The latest One Stop Centre Coimbatore (OSC Coimbatore) Recruitment 2026 has been announced for Case Worker, IT Admin, Security, and MultiPurpose Helper posts! Published at coimbatore.nic.in, this new recruitment drive offers 26 openings for eligible candidates. Applicants within the 21 to 40 years age group and possessing qualifications such as BSW, B.A Sociology, M.A/M.Sc Sociology, Psychology/Clinical Psychology, MSW, Graduate with Diploma in Computer/IT, or 8th Pass/10th Fail can apply offline from the notification release date to 30 May 2026. Find all details about the OSC Coimbatore Vario

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 40 years Age relaxation details are not specified in the provided data.

qualification.education_qualification: BSW, B.A.SOCIOLOGY, M.A/M.Sc SOCIOLOGY, PSYCHOLOGY/CLINICAL PSYCHOLOGY, Post Graduate in Social Work (MSW – PG) or Graduate with Diploma in computer/IT or 8th pass / 10th pass failed
qualification.details: CASE WORKER: BSW, B.A.SOCIOLOGY, M.A/M.Sc SOCIOLOGY, PSYCHOLOGY/CLINICAL PSYCHOLOGY, Post Graduate in Social Work (MSW – PG). First priority will be given to women. Native Should be Coimbatore. IT Admin: Graduate with Diploma in computer/IT. First priority will be given to women. Native Should be Coimbatore. SECURITY: 8th pass, 10th pass failed. First priority will be given to women. Native should in Coimbatore. MULTIPURPOSE HELPER: 8th pass, 10th pass failed. First priority will be given to women. Native should be Coimbatore.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for One Stop Centre Coimbatore Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website:coimbatore.nic.in/ .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 30-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the One Stop Centre Coimbatore Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application for the One Stop Centre Coimbatore Recruitment 2026 is 30th May 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address by this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the CASE WORKER post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 13 vacancies for the CASE WORKER post in the One Stop Centre Coimbatore Recruitment 2026. This offers a significant opportunity for eligible candidates.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum age requirement for the posts?
faq.answer: The minimum age requirement for all the posts under the One Stop Centre Coimbatore Recruitment 2026 is 21 years. Candidates must meet this age criterion to be eligible.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for the posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the posts in the One Stop Centre Coimbatore Recruitment 2026 is 40 years. Applicants should not exceed this age limit.

faq.question: Q5. What are the educational qualifications for the IT Admin post?
faq.answer: For the IT Admin post, candidates must be a Graduate with a Diploma in computer/IT. This ensures they have the necessary technical skills for the role.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any preference given to women candidates?
faq.answer: Yes, first priority will be given to women candidates for all the posts. This is a key aspect of the eligibility criteria mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for the One Stop Centre Coimbatore Recruitment 2026 is offline. Candidates need to download the form and send it via post.

faq.question: Q8. What is the salary for the MULTIPURPOSE HELPER post?
faq.answer: The salary for the MULTIPURPOSE HELPER post is Rs. 10,000/- per month. This is part of the consolidated salary structure for the contract positions.

faq.question: Q9. Are there any specific native requirements for the posts?
faq.answer: Yes, for CASE WORKER and IT Admin posts, the candidate should be a native of Coimbatore. For SECURITY and MULTIPURPOSE HELPER, the candidate should be native to Coimbatore.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The job type for all the positions in the One Stop Centre Coimbatore Recruitment 2026 is contract-based. This means the employment will be for a fixed duration.
